column1: A 3:4 aspect ratio print-ready design of the "Five Is A Vibe" theme. The copy is in a psychedelic, melting bubble font with a vintage 70s kids streetwear aesthetic. The central character is a cartoon smiley face with sunglasses and a backward cap, with its features subtly warped and liquefied. The peace-sign hands are soft and flowing. The checkerboard background is distorted into a retro optical illusion spiral. The color palette is vibrant retro, applied as a clean vector graphic with high contrast and bold lines. It features a sticker art style with a white border and is centered.

A centered 3:4 aspect ratio print design. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy typography is filled with a stylized retro galaxy texture. The central cool smiley face, wearing shades and a backward cap, has peace-sign hands, but all elements are composed of clean-line constellations. The checkered pattern backdrop is integrated with abstract crescent moons and retro-futuristic stars. The palette uses deep teals, burnt oranges, and golds for a cosmic-retro feel. Clean vector art, high contrast, bold lines, sticker border, no other elements.

A print-ready pattern with a 3:4 aspect ratio, centered. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy font is given a stylized "cracked" texture to look like an old screen print. The central smiley character is classic with sunglasses and a cap, but the yellow is slightly aged. Peace-sign hands are clean. The checkered background is muted with a retro distressed patina. This is clean vector art that simulates a textured print, with bold outlines and a wide white border. The vibrant retro palette is slightly desaturated.

A centered 3:4 print design. The groovy typography for "Five Is A Vibe" is composed entirely of integrated, stylized 70s-era daisy-like floral shapes. The smiley character has peace-sign hands, sunglasses, and a cap, with the cap itself covered in matching flowers. The checkered pattern backdrop features a mix of squares and flower heads. The color palette is warm and vibrant (sunshine yellow, coral, soft teal). Clean vector lines, high contrast, sticker border.

A 3:4 aspect ratio print design. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy text is stylized with precise, overlapping geometric shapes. The central smiley face character with shades and cap is depicted using geometric forms, with very sharp, blocky peace-sign hands. The checkered backdrop is perfectly aligned and symmetrical. The color palette is high-contrast retro with a focus on geometric color-blocking. Bold lines, clean vector art, and a precise white sticker-cut border.

A centered 3:4 print pattern. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy typography is flowing with undulating, wave-like lines. The smiley character with shades and cap is positioned at the nexus of several flowing color waves. The peace-sign hands are stylized with soft, rounded curves. The checkered pattern backdrop is broken up by organic, flowing lines. The colors are a blend of retro ocean teals, sunset oranges, and yellows. Clean vector art, bold lines, white border.

A centered 3:4 aspect ratio print-ready design. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy text has soft, paint-splatter edges. The central smiley with shades and backward cap has an overlay of abstract, retro-colored vector "splashes." The peace-sign hands are rendered with playful, less rigid strokes. The checkered pattern backdrop is present but partially obscured and interacted with by the vector splatters. High-contrast, bold lines, sticker-style border.

A 3:4 print design, centered. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy typography is rendered with soft, diffused retro color gradients within the letterforms. The central smiley with shades and a backward cap has a subtle "glowing" effect on the contours of its cap and glasses. The peace-sign hands are clean and bold. The checkered background uses softer, lower-contrast squares. Clean vector art with integrated gradients, bold lines, and a soft-edge white border.

A 3:4 print pattern, centered. The "Five Is A Vibe" groovy typography is given a stylized, deep 3D-effect shadow in a contrasting retro color, making it pop. The central smiley character with shades and cap is also layered with clear, flat-color shadows for depth. The peace-sign hands are layered as if coming towards the viewer. The checkered background is slightly recessed. Clean vector art, very high contrast, bold lines, sticker border.
